stem: Jia purchased 5 markers that cost p dollars each and 2 erasers that cost q dollars each. The equation 5p + 2q = 31 represents this situation. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 31 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The total cost, in dollars, of all markers and erasers purchased
The total cost, in dollars, of all markers purchased
The total cost, in dollars, of all erasers purchased
The difference, in dollars, between the cost of the markers and the erasers

rationale:
Choice A is correct. The term 5p is the total cost of markers and 2q is the total cost of erasers; their sum, 31, represents the total cost of all markers and erasers combined.

Choices B and C describe one component only. Choice D describes a difference, not a sum.
